archimate:BusinessObject.name: Monetary Amount
archimate:BusinessObject.documentation:
Represents a base business quantity.
It is:
Directly observed or captured
Atomic (even if calculated)
A property of a business object
Typically stored as a field
Examples: Claim Amount Premium Amount Deductible Amount Invoice Total
These are usually attributes of something.

properties.value: A quantified property of a financial entity or event, expressed as a monetary amount, quantity, rate, or percentage.
